name: Gak
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups White School Type Glue (Elmers, Manco)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Solution A by combining the glue and warm water.
2. Tint the mixture to the desired shade using food coloring.
3. Dissolve the borax in Solution B by mixing it with warm water; break up any small lumps for better dissolution.
4. Slowly pour Solution A into Solution B while stirring gently.
5. Gently scoop out the resulting gak from the reaction solution and knead it until it no longer feels slippery or slimy.
6. Enjoy your homemade gak! For more vibrant colors, consider using paste-type food colorings found in cake decorating sections of craft stores.
